title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Type-System Trace: Package Exports Types
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts package exports types increment in a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Align package exports, imports, type, declaration paths, runtime format, and supported environments.
Distinguish type-only and value imports and preserve runtime side effects intentionally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
